title: calyptrostylis articulata
intro: Calyptrostylis articulata, also known as the Australian calyptrostylis or articled calyptrostylis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Australia. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calyptrostylis articulata include its ability to alleviate congestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
